variables.notes: R:c. Selected current financing debt components appearing within the current liabilities section. Excluded 'Leasing Liabilities, Current' per rule and excluded payables/accruals. Did not include 'VAT loan' because it is more akin to tax/government deferral and is not consistently a standard borrowing line.

variables.notes: R:c. PPE total is ambiguous because both balance-sheet labels appear with blank previews. 'Tangibles, Total' is likely the active PPE total in some years, while 'Total Property/Plant/Equipment, Net' is an exact synonym that may apply historically. Review recommended to confirm which label is populated in the full statements and avoid duplication across years.
